title: Multi-Specialty Clinic
overview: Healthcare interior programme — reception, consultation suites, procedure rooms, and staff zones with compliance-ready specifications.
brief: A multi-specialty clinic required patient flows that reduce anxiety at reception, clear wayfinding to consultation and procedure rooms, and materials specified for clinical hygiene standards.
approach: Clinical advisory input shaped material selections and room adjacencies before joinery production. Phased commissioning allowed partial operational readiness while remaining zones completed.

execution.details: Clinical advisory input on material specs; phased commissioning for operational readiness.

outcome.summary: Consultation wing opened on schedule; procedure suites commissioned in a second phase with zero rework on infection-control specifications.
